final:
module sram_cell (  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out,  
    input wire RE,  
    input wire WE,  
    input wire CLK  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory;  

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (WE) begin  
            memory <= data_in;  
        end  
        if (RE) begin  
            data_out <= memory;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
